ddls:
CREATE TABLE "schools" (
  "school_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each school */,
  "school_name" TEXT /* Name of the school */,
  "district_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the district the school belongs to */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the school (e.g., city, state) */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the school */,
  "principal_name" TEXT /* Name of the school principal */,
  "enrollment" INTEGER /* Total number of students enrolled */,
  "founding_year" INTEGER /* Year the school was founded */,
  "website_url" TEXT /* URL to the school's website */,
  "school_type" TEXT /* Type of the school (e.g., public, private) */,
  "enrollment_by_grade" TEXT /* Enrollment numbers for each grade (JSON object) */,
  "total_teachers" INTEGER /* Total number of teachers */,
  "principal_contact_phone" TEXT /* Contact phone number for the principal */,
  "school_size" TEXT /* Size of the school (e.g., small, medium, large) */,
  "accreditation_status" TEXT /* Accreditation status of the school */,
  "last_inspection_date" TEXT /* Date of the last school inspection */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("school_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_schools_district_id FOREIGN KEY ("district_id") REFERENCES districts ("district_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "districts" (
  "district_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each district */,
  "district_name" TEXT /* Name of the district */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the district is located */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the district */,
  "superintendent_name" TEXT /* Name of the district superintendent */,
  "total_schools" INTEGER /* Total number of schools in the district */,
  "district_type" TEXT /* Type of the district (e.g., urban, rural) */,
  "total_students" INTEGER /* Total number of students in the district */,
  "district_website_url" TEXT /* URL to the district's website */,
  "last_evaluation_date" TEXT /* Date of the last district evaluation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("district_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_sets" (
  "data_set_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data set */,
  "school_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the school the data set belongs to */,
  "data_type_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the type of data (e.g., standardized test scores, graduation rates) */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the data was collected */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the data set */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the data set */,
  "file_size" REAL /* Size of the data set in MB */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the data set was uploaded */,
  "data_source" TEXT /* Source of the data (e.g., state education department, third-party research) */,
  "data_status" TEXT /* Status of the data (e.g., draft, published, archived) */,
  "data_collection_method" TEXT /* Method used to collect the data (e.g., online survey, paper survey) */,
  "data_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes about the data set */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_set_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_sets_school_id FOREIGN KEY ("school_id") REFERENCES schools ("school_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_sets_data_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_type_id") REFERENCES data_types ("data_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_types" (
  "data_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data type */,
  "data_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the data type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the data type */,
  "data_frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of data collection (e.g., yearly, semesterly) */,
  "data_source" TEXT /* Source of the data (e.g., state education department, third-party research) */,
  "data_reliability" TEXT /* Reliability of the data (e.g., high, medium, low) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "performance_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance metric */,
  "data_set_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the data set the metric belongs to */,
  "metric_name" TEXT /* Name of the metric (e.g., average score, passing rate) */,
  "metric_value" REAL /* Value of the metric */,
  "metric_date" TEXT /* Date the metric was recorded */,
  "metric_source" TEXT /* Source of the metric (e.g., internal, external) */,
  "metric_reliability" TEXT /* Reliability of the metric (e.g., high, medium, low) */,
  "metric_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes about the metric */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_metrics_data_set_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_set_id") REFERENCES data_sets ("data_set_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., administrator, researcher, teacher) */,
  "school_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the school the user belongs to */,
  "user_role_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user role */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* Date of the last login */,
  "account_status" TEXT /* Status of the user account (e.g., active, suspended) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_school_id FOREIGN KEY ("school_id") REFERENCES schools ("school_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "data_set_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data set being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data set */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data set was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "access_duration" TEXT /* Duration of the access session */,
  "access_ip" TEXT /* IP address of the user's device */,
  "access_device" TEXT /* Type of device used for access */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_data_set_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_set_id") REFERENCES data_sets ("data_set_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "subject_areas" (
  "subject_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each subject area */,
  "subject_name" TEXT /* Name of the subject area */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the subject area */,
  "subject_category" TEXT /* Category of the subject (e.g., core, elective) */,
  "subject_level" TEXT /* Level of the subject (e.g., beginner, advanced) */,
  "subject_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the subject */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("subject_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "grade_levels" (
  "grade_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each grade level */,
  "grade_name" TEXT /* Name of the grade level */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the grade level */,
  "grade_category" TEXT /* Category of the grade (e.g., elementary, secondary) */,
  "grade_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the grade level */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("grade_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "demographics" (
  "demographic_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each demographic category */,
  "demographic_name" TEXT /* Name of the demographic category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the demographic category */,
  "demographic_category" TEXT /* Category of the demographic (e.g., gender, race, socioeconomic status) */,
  "demographic_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the demographic category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("demographic_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_details" (
  "data_detail_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data detail */,
  "data_set_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the data set the detail belongs to */,
  "subject_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the subject area */,
  "grade_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the grade level */,
  "demographic_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the demographic category */,
  "data_value" REAL /* Value of the data detail */,
  "data_source" TEXT /* Source of the data (e.g., internal, external) */,
  "data_reliability" TEXT /* Reliability of the data (e.g., high, medium, low) */,
  "data_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes about the data detail */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_detail_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_details_data_set_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_set_id") REFERENCES data_sets ("data_set_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_details_subject_id FOREIGN KEY ("subject_id") REFERENCES subject_areas ("subject_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_details_demographic_id FOREIGN KEY ("demographic_id") REFERENCES demographics ("demographic_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_details_grade_id FOREIGN KEY ("grade_id") REFERENCES grade_levels ("grade_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "report_name" TEXT /* Name of the report */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of the report (e.g., performance, demographic) */,
  "generated_date" TEXT /* Date the report was generated */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the report */,
  "generated_by_user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who generated the report */,
  "school_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the school the report pertains to */,
  "report_status" TEXT /* Status of the report (e.g., draft, published, archived) */,
  "report_audience" TEXT /* Audience for the report (e.g., internal, public) */,
  "report_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes about the report */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_generated_by_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("generated_by_user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_school_id FOREIGN KEY ("school_id") REFERENCES schools ("school_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "report_data" (
  "report_data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report data entry */,
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the report the data belongs to */,
  "data_set_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the data set used in the report */,
  "data_value" REAL /* Value of the data used in the report */,
  "data_description" TEXT /* Description of the data used in the report */,
  "data_source" TEXT /* Source of the data (e.g., internal, external) */,
  "data_reliability" TEXT /* Reliability of the data (e.g., high, medium, low) */,
  "data_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes about the report data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_report_data_report_id FOREIGN KEY ("report_id") REFERENCES reports ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_report_data_data_set_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_set_id") REFERENCES data_sets ("data_set_id")
)
